name: Meike FF-Prime Cine 105mm T2.1 Lens (PL-Mount, Feet/Meters)
description: Shoot full-frame cine footage with high-resolution images and natural bokeh with shallow depth of field on cameras with a PL- mount with the FF-Prime Cine 105mm T2.1 Lens from Meike.

features.Key Features:: Full-Frame Coverage, 45mm Image Circle | T2.1 to T22 | 85mm Front Diameter | 11 Iris Blades | 82mm Front Filter Threads | Focus Marks in Feet & Meters | 330° Focus Rotation | 0.8 MOD Focus & Iris Gears
features.What's in the box?: Meike FF-Prime Cine 105mm T2.1 Lens (PL-Mount, Feet/Meters) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Support Foot | Lens Support Screw Set | Allen Wrench | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
